title: BGS Knowledge Base Record Frontmatter
description: JSON Schema for the structured frontmatter object on an agentic cross-game Bethesda Game Studios knowledge-base record.

id.description: Stable kebab-case dotted namespace for the record, ending in a lifetime schema version segment such as .v1.

title.description: One-line human-readable title for the knowledge-base record.

kind.description: Optional coarse record kind for retrieval and future promotion workflows.

domains.description: Closed taxonomy labels used for retrieval, filtering, and review assignment.

items.description: A domain enum value from the BGS KB taxonomy.

appliesTo.description: Game and engine-family scope for this record, including explicit exclusions when needed.

games.description: Game codes this record applies to before exclusions are considered.

engineFamilies.description: Optional engine-family scope used for cross-game grouping and filtering.

excludes.description: Game codes explicitly excluded from an otherwise broader record scope.

items.description: A supported Bethesda game code excluded from this record.

canonical.description: Canonical retrieval snippet and confidence level for the base record before any per-game variant merge.

answer.description: One to three sentence canonical answer used as the default retrieval synopsis.

confidence.description: Evidence level for the canonical answer.

variants.description: Optional per-game overlays merged into the canonical record when callers request a specific game.

propertyNames.description: Variant keys must be supported game codes.

additionalProperties.description: Game-specific additions, warnings, and textual deletions for a base record.

additions.description: Game-specific notes appended to the base record during variant merge.

warnings.description: Game-specific callouts rendered during variant merge.

items.description: A warning emitted with a game-specific variant.

code.description: Short stable warning code displayed in variant callouts.

severity.description: Warning severity for the variant callout.

text.description: Human-readable warning text for the variant callout.

deletions.description: Exact textual substrings to delete from the canonical body during variant merge.

queryKeys.description: Optional lexical aliases and task phrases boosted by retrieval.

items.description: A query alias for this record.

severity.description: Optional impact level used as a retrieval sort tie-breaker.

sources.description: Structured citations supporting the record; every record must include at least one source.

items.description: A structured source citation for a KB record.

kind.description: Source category for review and trust calibration.

ref.description: Human-readable source reference such as a file path, issue id, page title, or pinned-message label.

url.description: Optional URL for a web-addressable source.

sectionPath.description: Optional source section, heading, or path within the cited reference.

related.description: Strong knowledge-graph links to sibling records that should be considered together.

items.description: Stable id of a related record.

seeAlso.description: Soft cross-references to records that may provide useful adjacent context.

items.description: Stable id of a see-also record.

lastReviewed.description: Date when this record was last reviewed, in ISO yyyy-mm-dd form.

schemaVersion.description: Frontmatter schema version for this record shape.
